name: Zoom Privileged Accounts Stale (30 days)
description: Detects privileged zoom accounts with stale login activity.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.first_name AS account_name, u.last_login_time AS last_login FROM zoom_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%super%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND (u.last_login_time IS NULL OR u.last_login_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review privileged stale accounts immediately; remove excessive privileges or disable unused access.
